allow_instructions: All development work for Flip project
git pull, git push, git checkout, git merge
adb devices, adb reverse, adb shell, adb push, adb pull
expo prebuild, expo run:android, expo start
Network calls and file writes within workspace
block_instructions: Do NOT commit secrets (.env files, API keys, credentials)
Do NOT force push to main or master branches
Do NOT delete critical files without confirmation

projectContext.name: Flip
projectContext.description: React Native Bluesky client (Android dev with Expo, MMKV, OAuth)
devScripts: flip-dev.bat — git pull + adb + Metro + launch
flip-reset-dev.bat — kill Metro, clear cache, fresh start
npm run dev:connect:reset — full reset with device testing
